prestazioni: LS1 (5.7L Gen III V8, engine code: LS1) forced induction upgrade with a Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer, 58lb/min flow) paired with a custom-built intercooler setup by ProCharger featuring a 4.5" thick core and 3.5" inlet/outlet piping for optimized airflow under sustained boost (targeting 12-14 psi on 93 octane)

Forged internals build by JE Pistons (9.5:1 compression, 2618 alloy forged pistons) with Eagle H-beam connecting rods, Callies crankshaft (4.00" stroke), and ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs to handle 800+ whp reliably; paired with a COMP Cams 230/236 duration camshaft (0.600" lift, 114 LSA) for aggressive valvetrain response

Fuel system overhaul with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom LS1-specific tune by HP Tuners for precise AFR targeting (11.5:1 under boost, 13.5:1 cruise) and launch control optimization (2-step rev limiter set at 4,500 RPM for drag launches)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (PONTAIC-TA-WS6 specific) with extended carbon fiber fenders (2.5" wider front, 3.5" wider rear), custom fabricated aluminum overfenders, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and downforce at speed

Custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels (19x10.5 +15 front, 19x12 +25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear) for maximum grip, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) big brake kit with slotted rotors

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-L II bucket seats (WS6-specific mounting brackets), Takata 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (8-point bolt-in, TIG-welded 1.75" DOM tubing) with a suede-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel and a digital dash cluster by AEM (CD-7) for real-time telemetry
